title: DDB Integrator
description: Brings your D&D Beyond dice rolls into Foundry VTT as one unified, cinematic chat card — and gives rolls made inside Foundry the same polish. Pure roll integration and presentation: no automation, no targeting, just every roll shown beautifully, with optional full-screen cinematics and your own sound effects on a handful of key moments. Connects to the D&D Beyond game log on its own via a ddb-proxy (no MidiQOL or other modules required).
